notebooklm.title: SOSFiler 50-State Formation and Change Filing Research

research_statuses.researching: Sources are being collected or reviewed.
research_statuses.drafted: A draft action map exists but is not verified enough for product use.
research_statuses.verified: Official sources support all customer-facing rules and fees.
research_statuses.implemented: The action map is wired into product logic or operator flow.

TX.reason: Live Clarence High LLC order and Texas SOSDirect workflow already partially mapped.
next_actions: Complete Texas LLC formation approval watcher.
Map LLC amendments, registered agent change, address change, dissolution, annual/franchise public information report, certificates, copies, foreign entity registrations, and withdrawals.
Map state/county/city DBA or assumed-name paths and major city/county business license paths.
Map corporations and nonprofits after LLC post-formation actions.
Verify current SilverFlume entity formation and change filing flows from official sources.
Map fees, annual list/business license renewal, foreign registrations, withdrawals, state business license, county/city DBA or business license paths.

CA.reason: High-volume state with existing customer demand likely.
next_actions: Map BizFile Online formation, foreign registrations, Statement of Information, amendments, agent/address changes, dissolution/withdrawal, certificates, copies, county FBN publication paths, and city/county business tax certificate paths.

DE.reason: High-volume formation state; registered agent strategy is central.
next_actions: Map formation, foreign qualification, franchise tax/annual report, amendments, dissolution/withdrawal, certificates, copies, registered-agent dependency, county/city DBA paths, and local business license paths.

Map Sunbiz formations, foreign qualifications, annual reports, amendments, registered agent changes, dissolution/withdrawal, certificates, copies, fictitious name registrations, and local business tax receipts.
Map formation, foreign registrations, annual report/license tax, amendments, RA changes, dissolution/withdrawal, certificates, copies, trade names, and local business licenses.

NY.reason: High-volume state with publication and extra compliance complexity.
next_actions: Map formation, foreign registrations, publication workflow, biennial statements, amendments, dissolution/withdrawal, certificates, copies, assumed names, county clerk DBA paths, and local licenses.

GA.reason: High-volume state with online annual registration.
next_actions: Map formation, foreign registrations, annual registration, amendments, RA changes, dissolution/withdrawal, certificates, copies, trade names, and local occupation tax/business license paths.

IL.reason: Common formation state and relevant to existing order ID format/history.
next_actions: Map formation, foreign registrations, annual report, amendments, RA changes, dissolution/withdrawal, certificates, copies, assumed names, county/city business licenses.
